'''Garbage Masher''' was an online game found on [[StarWars.com]]. In the game, the player has to save [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] from the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Garbage Compactor 3263827|garbage compactor]] by correctly answering questions throughout four levels. The game is no longer available on the site.<ref name="Game site" />

{{Game-stub}}
